data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Invoice generation and aging status', but the evidence provided does not include any specific information regarding the generation of invoices or their aging status. The linked use case mentions the need for invoice generation and tracking against due dates, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that these functionalities are implemented or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of invoice generation and aging status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify invoice generation and aging status.
